norwegian: Du ___ ikke betale for det — det er gratis.
english: You don't need to pay for it — it's free.

norwegian: Du ___ spise mer grønnsaker — det er sunt.
english: You should eat more vegetables — it's healthy.

norwegian: Jeg ___ ikke hoppe fra det høye brettet.
english: I don't dare to jump from the high diving board.

norwegian: Jeg ___ ha vært mer forsiktig.
english: I should have been more careful.

norwegian: Du burde ringe legen hvis du fortsatt har feber.
english: You should call the doctor if you still have a fever.

norwegian: Du trenger ikke å hjelpe meg — jeg klarer det selv.
english: You don't need to help me — I can manage on my own.

norwegian: Jeg orker ikke lage middag i dag — vi bestiller pizza.
english: I don't have the energy to cook dinner today — we're ordering pizza.

norwegian: Hun torde endelig si hva hun mente på møtet.
english: She finally dared to say what she thought at the meeting.

norwegian: Vi burde ha tatt bussen — bilen var for full.
english: We should have taken the bus — the car was too full.

norwegian: Jeg burde spise mer frukt.
english: I should eat more fruit.

norwegian: Jeg orker ikke å løpe.
english: I don't have the energy to run.

norwegian: Jeg orket å fullføre.
english: I had the energy to finish.

norwegian: Jeg trengte å hvile.
english: I needed to rest.

norwegian: Hun tørde å si nei.
english: She dared to say no.

norwegian: Vi orket ikke å vente.
english: We didn't have the energy to wait.

norwegian: Hun trenger å løse denne oppgaven.
english: She needs to solve this task.

norwegian: Jeg orker ikke å gå lenger.
english: I don't have the energy to walk further.

norwegian: Hun trenger ikke å kjøpe nye sko.
english: She doesn't need to buy new shoes.

norwegian: Han tørde å si nei til jobben.
english: He dared to say no to the job.

norwegian: Jeg orket å fullføre maratonløpet.
english: I had the energy to finish the marathon.

norwegian: Jeg burde ha spist mer frokost.
english: I should have eaten more breakfast.

norwegian: Hun trengte å snakke med noen.
english: She needed to talk to someone.

norwegian: Du trenger å sove mer.
english: You need to sleep more.

norwegian: Hun tør ikke svømme.
english: She doesn't dare to swim.

norwegian: Vi burde gå tidligere.
english: We should leave earlier.

norwegian: Du trenger ikke kjøpe det.
english: You don't need to buy it.

norwegian: Han tør prøve.
english: He dares to try.

norwegian: De burde være her.
english: They should be here.

norwegian: Han tør svømme i havet.
english: He dares to swim in the sea.

norwegian: Du burde sove mer.
english: You should sleep more.

norwegian: Jeg måtte vente i over en time på legekontoret.
english: I had to wait for over an hour at the doctor's office.

norwegian: Han skulle ha ringt meg, men han glemte det.
english: He was supposed to have called me, but he forgot.

norwegian: Kunne du hjelpe meg med bagasjen?
english: Could you help me with the luggage?

norwegian: Vi ville gjerne ha bestilt bord, men restauranten var full.
english: We would have liked to book a table, but the restaurant was full.

norwegian: Du burde ha pakket regnjakken — nå er du gjennomvåt.
english: You should have packed the rain jacket — now you are soaked.

norwegian: Jeg kunne ikke finne nøklene mine da jeg skulle gå.
english: I could not find my keys when I was about to leave.

norwegian: Hun måtte ha glemt avtalen, for hun dukket aldri opp.
english: She must have forgotten the appointment, because she never showed up.

norwegian: Jeg ___ ha kjøpt billetten tidligere — nå er alt utsolgt.
english: I should have bought the ticket earlier — now everything is sold out.

norwegian: Vi ___ gjerne bli lenger, men vi har ikke tid.
english: We would gladly stay longer, but we don't have time.

norwegian: Han ___ ha tatt feil buss, for han kom aldri frem.
english: He must have taken the wrong bus, because he never arrived.
